headline: Workday (WDAY) Is Up 13.8% After Tapping AWS To Power Its HR And Finance Data Cloud
summary: Earlier this week, Workday announced that its Workday Data Cloud will integrate with Amazon Web Services, enabling bi-directional zero-copy access to governed HR and finance data through AWS tools and AI services without custom pipelines or data duplication. This move, alongside new agent-building tools and security attestation via Agent Passport, positions Workday as a core data and AI hub for mission-critical HR and finance workflows across multiple cloud ecosystems. We’ll now examine how...
